title: dillwynia floribunda
intro: Dillwynia floribunda, also known as the flower dill, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the eastern coast of Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dillwynia floribunda include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Dillwynia floribunda can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in cooking and as a garnish, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
